roa.docketEntryComment: ORDER FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED
DEFENDANTS MOTION TO CLARIFY DISPO FILED
/X:AMENDED MINUTE/X:JUDGE LIN APPEARS VIA ZOOM/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:12-04-19/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:48 DAYS/ADDL CTS:24/PROB EXT:09-10-21/4019HALF/EMTERM/

/CAL:APD MTR FILING/CON:SCOTT SUGARMAN/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD:CURFEW: 8PM TO 4AM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD SHORT FORM REPORT APD MTR/APD-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP:03-12-21/CTORD:A SHORT FORM REPORT/PROB ADMREV/S26/CONTD:SHORT FORM REPORT AND TO SET APD MTR/DOP/

/CAL:CLARIFY DISPOSITION/DAWT/CTORD:PRIOR ORDER DATED 12-27-19 REMAINS INFULL FORCE AND EFFECT/X:COURT MODIFIES TERM AND CONDITION AS FOLLOWS, THAT DEFENDANT ENROLL IN APD'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING - GPS PROGRAM FOR 45 ACTUAL DAYS/

/CAL:TS DA MTR/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:12-04-19/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:27 DAYS/ADDL CTS:27/CTORD:THAT UPON RELEASE AND NO LATER THAN 01-03-20, DEFENDANT ENROLL IN APD'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING-GPS PROGRAM FOR 90DAYS WHICH INCLUDES A CURFEW FROM 8:00 P,M, TO 4:00 A,M, MONDAY THROUGH SUNDAY/4019HALF/RESTV/RESTO:KENNETH BAGWELL, KEVIN LAYMOUN AND EMILY MCCALL//PROB EXT: 09-10-21/
/CAL:DA 1203,2PC MOTION/CON:SILAS GENESON/CONTD SHORT FORM REPORT DA MTR/SHER/NB/DA-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP:12-18-19/CTORD:A SHORT FORM REPORT,/PROB ADM REV/S22/CONTD:SHORT FORM REPORT DA MTR/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLIANT TO INCLUDE COUNT 2, 245(A)4PC, A FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-27-19/PPRFCUST/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:I & A AND P & C/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICEDECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:LAZARUS/GEORGE/X:DISTRICT ATTORNEY INDICATED THAT COMPLAINT SHOULD SHOW PRIOR  ALLEGATIONS WITH THE CORRECT DATE OF 06-03-2015/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-07-19/987,2/BAIL:150,000//SA1:ALYSSA WILLIAMS/SA4:LEE'S MARKET AT 1397 REVERE AVE, SF/SA2:1362 SHAFTER AVE, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:SHORT SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT ON DA MTR/S26/CONTD:TO SET DA MTR/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE ARRAIGNMENT,/BAIL:150,000/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/DOP/
